doNotOverstate: Do not import custody safeguards unless the papers support it.
Do not import drugs continuity unless the papers support it.
Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Do not import phone extraction/metadata unless the papers support it.
Do not say BWV shows or confirms events unless the clip is served.
Do not state "CCTV confirms" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
Do not state "CCTV proves" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
Do not state "Full CCTV confirms" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
hardRules: Referred only does not mean usable.
Inference must be labelled as inference.
No line is sendable just because a source exists.

chaseItems.label: CCTV Continuity / provenance
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide cCTV Continuity / provenance or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy. Evidence state: missing. Source: Police / CCTV unit. Solicitor review required before sending.]
